concept: I Brake for Yard Sales – Competitive Edition
title: Funny Hobbies Yard Sale T-Shirt for Thrifters and Bargain Hunters
description:
Some people slow down for wildlife crossings, others for school zones—then there’s you, slamming on the brakes for a yard sale sign like it’s the clearance aisle of destiny. This shirt is for the champions of thrift, the seekers of treasure, and the connoisseurs of hidden gems. Let the world know: you’re out here, and you mean business. 

Perfect for:
- Weekend warriors hunting for bargains and vintage gold
- Those whose car trunks double as portable antique storage
- Folks who consider haggling an Olympic sport

DETAILS: Bold, eye-catching typography graphic that says, 'I Brake for Yard Sales' with a playful, competitive twist—our spin on thrifting humor. Available in multiple color options so you can sport your thrifting pride while on the hunt. Made-to-order design for thrift lovers, seekers of unique finds, and undeniable deal chasers.

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
